topics: Acquire text data from a standard dataset such as 20 Newsgroup, perform text extraction, clean-up, and pre-processing tasks such as tokenization, stemming, lemmatization, and stop-word removal
Implement basic vectorization approaches like One-Hot Encoding, Bag of Words, and TF-IDF, and compare these methods on a sample dataset
Explore word embeddings using Word2Vec, GloVe, and Doc2Vec, and visualize word embeddings to analyse their effectiveness in capturing semantic relationships
Create a pipeline for text classification, including feature extraction and model selection (e.g., Naïve Bayes, Logistic Regression, SVM), and apply it to a sentiment analysis task
Tune hyper-parameters for Naïve Bayes, Logistic Regression, and SVM models to improve sentiment classification accuracy
Develop a Named Entity Recognition (NER) system using sequence labelling techniques that handles ambiguity in NER, and evaluate the NER model
Build a general Information Extraction (IE) pipeline, focusing on extracting structured information such as names, dates, and relations from unstructured text
Implement supervised learning approaches to relation detection and classification, and apply them to extract relationships between entities in a text corpus
Build an inverted index, applying term weighting and document scoring techniques, and use it to evaluate the performance of an IR system on a sample dataset
Implement a basic neural network model for machine translation and a factoid question-answering system, including question processing, passage retrieval, and answer generation
